channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipped radiator, 18th March
item.description:
Fly tipped radiator

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 74, London Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping of electrical equipment including fridges and commercial printer as well as other items, 18th March
item.description:
Both sides of the road immediately south of the disused railway bridge on the first turning right off the A436 – lane leading to Syreford.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Syreford Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Inspection cover raised, 18th March
item.description:
On the raised pavement opposite the entrance to Baytree Nursing Home The large inspection cover is not fitted into its recess and has raised up causing a serious trip hazard to pedestrians.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, High Street, Noverton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter left after Gold Cup week, 18th March
item.description:
All along the new cyclepath there are bottles and drinks cans and bags of rubbish left after race week. It looks terrible and a simple litter pick would sort it out. Doesn't look very smart as main road into cheltenham
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evesham Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very large pothole filled with water, 18th March
item.description:
On the lechlade road near Thyme hotel. Hard to know exactly where as was later in the afternoon and not from the area

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 263,265, Pirton Lane, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in road outside 41 Carmarthen Road, 18th March
item.description:

item.title: Green or amber traffic light is not working problem, 18th March
item.description:
lights for ped crossing not working nor buttons for crossing.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working
